name: 原型制作
subject: design
domain_name: 产品设计 / Product Design / Product Design
curriculum_points: Students will be able to construct a physical or digital prototype that models key features of their final design idea for the purpose of testing and evaluation.
Students in MYP 3-5 will be able to select and justify appropriate prototyping methods (e.g., paper, 3D print, digital mock-up) based on the design context and testing goals.
